html:
Exclusive to:

The Claw Palm Sapling is a renewable resource Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires Cork and Manure to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

After 0.75-1 days, it will become a Claw Palm Tree at its first growth level.

Trivia

  • Claw Palm Saplings originally had red leaves, but the color was changed in the Quality of Life update to make them more distinguishable from Rainforest Trees.
  • This is the only refine tab structure in solo Don't Starve.

Gallery

  • The old design of the Claw Palm Sapling.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Wolfgang
“It'll never get better than this.”
–Wendy
“REQUIRES RESOURCES”
–WX-78
“Require quite a bit of care.”
–Wickerbottom
“Too small to chop right now.”
–Woodie
“You're on your own, tree.”
–Maxwell
“Evidence would suggest it wouldn't survive in the wild.”
–Wagstaff
“May it gröw as tall as Thör.”
–Wigfrid
“I bet it'll grow up big and strong.”
–Webber
“That was a lot of work for a little tree.”
–Walani
“It feeds on fertilizer.”
–Warly
“Too small fer a mast.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS TENDER SAPLING”
–Wilba
“Grow friend! Grow!”
–Wormwood
“You better be worth the effort.”
–Wheeler
The Claw Palm Sapling is a renewable resource Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires Cork and Manure to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
After 0.75-1 days, it will become a Claw Palm Tree at its first growth level.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Claw Palm Saplings originally had red leaves, but the color was changed in the Quality of Life update to make them more distinguishable from Rainforest Trees.
This is the only refine tab structure in solo Don't Starve.

The old design of the Claw Palm Sapling.

The '''Claw Palm Sapling''' is a [[Renewable resources|renewable]] resource [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires [[Cork]] and [[Manure]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

After 0.75-1 days, it will become a [[Tree/Claw Palm Tree|Claw Palm Tree]] at its first growth level.

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Claw Palm Saplings originally had red leaves, but the color was changed in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet#Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update to make them more distinguishable from [[Tree/Rainforest|Rainforest Trees]].
*This is the only refine tab structure in solo Don't Starve.

=={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery==
<gallery captionalign="center" hideaddbutton="true">
Claw Palm Sapling Old.png|The old design of the Claw Palm Sapling.
</gallery>
